summary: Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/zoom-owasp-headers.md`. The changed code matches the spec: required headers are applied before all routes/static assets, CSP includes the required sources, `dev-state.md` is ignored and untracked, error reporting and the error boundary are wired, and the backlog entry exists. I could not complete the local gate in this read-only sandbox because Vitest needs to write a Vite temp config and the server tests cannot bind a local port here.
